/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -O2 -fdebug-prefix-map=/home/nv/L_ws_lsy/n1_L_ego/src/faster-lio=. -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -DNDEBUG -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pthread -fexceptions -g -ggdb  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock.so -o ../lib/libgmock.so CMakeFiles/gmock.dir/src/gmock-all.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nv/L_ws_lsy/n1_L_ego/src/faster-lio/.obj-aarch64-linux-gnu/gtest/lib ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
